title: Trellix Web Gateway Rule Set
description: Represents a policy rule set configured on the Trellix Web Gateway, containing ordered rules with conditions and actions for web traffic processing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the rule set

name.description: Display name of the rule set

description.description: Description of the rule set purpose

type.description: Processing phase in which this rule set is evaluated

enabled.description: Whether the rule set is currently active

order.description: Processing order relative to other rule sets

ruleCount.description: Number of rules contained in this rule set

rules.description: Ordered list of rules within this rule set

Rule.description: An individual policy rule with a condition and action

order.description: Processing order within the rule set

RuleCondition.description: Condition that determines when a rule matches

property.description: Property to evaluate (e.g., URL.Host, URL.Categories, Antimalware.Infected, Client.IP)

listRef.description: Reference to a custom list for list-based operations

RuleAction.description: Action to execute when a rule condition matches

blockTemplate.description: Block page template to display when action is block

redirectUrl.description: URL to redirect to when action is redirect
